miner_claim.provenance_note: local illustrative example only; no live subnet, wallet, chain, provider call, rights-clearance claim, or final canon claim

proposed_state_transition.summary: seed_character_alpha rejects a tempting false memory and records the contradiction for later repair.
proposed_state_transition.scene_excerpt: seed_character_alpha pauses before the archive mirror. The memory is beautiful, but its timestamp is impossible. The character marks it as a false light instead of letting it become canon.

continuity_rationale: The proposal preserves the seed character's memory-guardian role without making a final character-canon or visual-canon claim.
creative_contribution: Adds a reusable future hook around false-memory detection.
